title: Emberwake
logline: A village on the caldera's lip sends two hopefuls into the smoldering deep to still the mountain's heart.
world_sketch: Cinderfall is the last village on the caldera's lip. For a generation the mountain slept; now the wells run warm and ash dusts the rooftops. Beneath the village, the old miners' shafts open into the Ember Depth — three floors down to the vault where the Ash Tyrant stirs. A key of cooled ember, lost in the middle shaft, opens the vault. Two volunteers go down. The village waits.
